# 🏛️ Code Colosseum: Battle Demos

**Live demo landing page: [codecolosseum999.github.io/CodeColosseum-Demos](https://codecolosseum999.github.io/CodeColosseum-Demos)**

---

**Welcome to the official artifact repository for the Code Colosseum YouTube channel.**

This repository hosts the raw, unedited code generated by AI models (DeepSeek, GPT, Gemini, Claude, etc.) during our coding battles. Click any model name in the grid above to run its demo instantly.

---

## ⚠️ Disclaimer & Usage

* **Raw Output:** The code in this repository is generated by AI and is provided "as-is" without manual bug fixing. It represents the raw performance of the models at the time of recording.
* **License / Rights:** See `LICENSE`, `NOTICE`, and `TRADEMARK.md` for permitted use, provenance, and branding guidance.
* **Content Rights:** These demos were generated for the **Code Colosseum** YouTube channel. If you wish to showcase these results in your own content, you need written permission.

## 🔗 Connect

* [**Watch the Battles on YouTube**](https://youtube.com/@CodeColosseum999)
* [**Subscribe for Updates**](https://youtube.com/@CodeColosseum999?sub_confirmation=1)

## 📂 Repository Structure

```
CodeColosseum-Demos/
│
├── index.html           ← Live demo grid (GitHub Pages entry point)
├── index_template.html   ← Template used to generate index.html
├── generate_index.py    ← Script that regenerates index.html
│
├── .github/workflows/generate-pages.yml  ← Auto-regenerates index.html on push
│
├── 2026-03-28_magnetic_iron_filings_bloom/
│   ├── prompt.txt
│   ├── claude.html
│   ├── gpt.html
│   ├── gemini.html
│   └── deepseek.html
└── ...
```

## 🛠️ Adding a New Demo

Open a pull request with a new `YYYY-MM-DD_name/` folder containing:
- `prompt.txt` — the battle prompt
- `claude.html`, `gpt.html`, `gemini.html`, `deepseek.html` — each model's generated demo

After the PR is merged, GitHub Actions automatically regenerates `index.html`.
